brand_identity.name: Lemieux Management Group (LMG)
brand_identity.inspiration: UTA (United Talent Agency) - Minimal, Bold, Sophisticated, Cinematic

typography.instructions: Import 'Oswald' (weights 500, 700) and 'Roboto' (weights 400, 500) from Google Fonts in index.css

visual_enhancers.gradients: None. Use solid blocks of color.

Navbar.specs: Sticky, glassmorphism (black/80), yellow accent on active, logo left, links right. Mobile menu full screen black.

Hero.specs: Full viewport height (h-screen). Background image with heavy black overlay (bg-black/60). Centered or Bottom-Left aligned massive typography 'TALENT. MEDIA. GLOBAL.'. Yellow CTA button 'JOIN LMG'.

Services.specs: 3-column grid. Tall cards (aspect-[3/4]). Image covers full card. Text overlay at bottom. Hover: Image zooms slightly, Yellow border appears.

ContactForm.specs: Minimalist. White background. Black borders for inputs. Sharp edges. Yellow submit button. Fields: Name, Email, Subject (Dropdown), Message.

Footer.specs: Black background. Massive 'LMG' watermark in dark grey. Social links in Yellow. Copyright text small white.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL DEPENDENCIES: Run 'npm install framer-motion lenis react-icons' or 'yarn add framer-motion lenis react-icons'.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors (primary: #f4cd2a) and fonts (Oswald, Roboto).
3. IMPORT FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import link to index.css.
4. IMPLEMENT SMOOTH SCROLL: Wrap the application in a Lenis scroll provider or initialize Lenis in App.js.
5. USE SHADCN CAREFULLY: For the Contact Form, use Shadcn components but override the rounded corners to 'rounded-none' to match the sharp, professional brand aesthetic.
6. DATA-TESTID: Ensure every interactive element (buttons, inputs, links) has a 'data-testid' attribute.
7. NO TRANSPARENT OVERLAYS: Ensure dropdowns and modals have a solid background (white or black) to prevent text overlap issues.
8. MOBILE FIRST: Ensure typography scales down properly on mobile (e.g., text-4xl instead of text-8xl).

universal_guidelines.design_philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.
anti_patterns: Do not use generic 'Inter' font for headings.
Do not use gradients for the primary yellow.
Do not use rounded buttons (use sharp or pill, prefer sharp for this brand).
universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure text contrast is high. Yellow text on white is often hard to read; use Yellow for backgrounds/accents and Black for text, or Yellow text ONLY on Black backgrounds.
